title: Groww Weekly Review Pulse

top_3_themes.name: Technical Issues and Bugs
top_3_themes.summary: Users frequently encounter severe bugs, crashes, and critical technical errors disrupting app functionality, especially during trading.

top_3_themes.name: User Experience and Features
top_3_themes.summary: While ease of use is appreciated, users are requesting crucial feature additions and improvements, including the restoration of key functionalities.

top_3_themes.name: Customer Support and Responsiveness
top_3_themes.summary: Frustration is high due to slow, unresponsive customer support and a lack of timely updates on critical financial issues.

top_3_quotes: Terrible experience the app auto-liquidated my mutual funds and refuses to provide any update on the liquidated amount
Many bugs are coming while trading in apps and they are irritating me.
External funds tracking has been paused which was one of the USP of this app.
top_3_actions: Immediately launch a crisis resolution sprint to hotfix critical trading bugs and investigate incidents like unauthorized fund liquidations.
Implement stringent SLAs for customer support response and resolution times, specifically for financial disputes and urgent inquiries.
Prioritize performance optimization to mitigate app lag and speed issues; concurrently, evaluate reinstating or addressing the gap left by 'external funds tracking'.
